name: EHC 8322 — Milk products not for human consumption (Category 3 ABP)

metadata.description: UK milk, milk-based and milk-derived products NOT for human consumption. Category 3 Animal By-Product (ABP). Header: 'Milk, milk-based products and milk-derived products not for human consumption'. I.25 has four tickboxes (Animal feedingstuff, Further process, Production of petfood, Technical use) — exactly one must be ticked. I.20 is blank on 8322.
metadata.notes: Shares source file with EHC 8468. Claude reads the full markdown rule set on every check and applies Parts A + B + C + E for 8322 certificates. Key 8322 differences: I.25 tickboxes mandatory, I.12 Cat 3 approval number should be present, I.28 production dates not required, Part II preamble requires product-type deletion.
